description: Atomically transition a wallet between custody tiers. Supports Tier 1 → 2, Tier 1 → 3, and Tier 2 → 3 (one-way upgrades). Deletes the prior custody record, optionally stores a new Tier 2 encrypted blob, revokes active dApp consent grants, and updates the tier. Wallet address stays the same.

newTier.description: Target tier: user_encrypted or self_custody (custodial is a downgrade and is unsupported).

newEncryptedBlob.description: Required when newTier is user_encrypted. Opaque AES-GCM blob produced by wrapping the mnemonic under the user's passphrase.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing required fields or oversize blob.

errors.name: UnsupportedChain
errors.description: chain must be ethereum or solana.

errors.name: WalletNotFound
errors.description: No such wallet for this DID.

errors.name: WalletInactive
errors.description: Wallet has been exported or superseded.

errors.name: UnsupportedTransition
errors.description: Requested transition is not supported (downgrades are not allowed).
